summary: Three-tier skill loading architecture with intelligent dispatcher and 30 new domain skills, reducing always-loaded slash commands from 49 to 23 while growing the total skill library to 68+.

decisions.what: Hybrid loading: auto-detect + manual override via harness.config.json
Two-tier registry: core slash commands + searchable catalog
decisions.why: Mirrors existing deferred-tool pattern, minimal new infrastructure
Unified discovery, local and fast, no network dependency

decisions.what: Hash-based staleness check on every query
decisions.why: Laziest correct approach — no watchers, no hooks, sub-100ms rebuild
7 workflow + 16 maintenance always loaded, 44+ catalog discoverable, 6 dependency-only invisible
Proactive suggestions based on task + stack signals, top 3, confidence threshold 0.4

decisions.what: 30 new domain skills with full SKILL.md content
decisions.why: Backend, infra, reliability, auth, compliance, testing, soft domains, data, ML/AI, mobile
search_skills is MCP tool, platform differences handled at edges
